title: Magnificently Braised Mexican Bean Sprouts Paella
description: A savory and creamy Mexican dish featuring braised bean sprouts, this paella is a show-off recipe that combines the flavors of Veracruz with the traditional Spanish dish, perfect for a special occasion or a dinner party
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the tomato paste, cumin, and paprika, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the bean sprouts, saffron threads, and vegetable broth, and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes
Stir in the coconut cream and cook for an additional 5 minutes
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro
